b994f0df33c1.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
b994f0df33c1.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
b994f0df33c1.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

1441a1a966d1.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
1441a1a966d1.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

efc98a83f711.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
efc98a83f711.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
efc98a83f711.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.
